task_completion.description: Verify the service 'Network Installation & Setup' is created with the correct details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a service record or list view showing the name 'Network Installation & Setup', usage unit 'Hours', price '125.00', and an active status.

task_completion.description: Verify the quote is created with the correct subject, organization, contact, and stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a quote record showing the subject 'TechNova - Branch Network Setup', organization 'TechNova Solutions', contact 'David Chen', and stage 'Created'.

task_completion.description: Verify the billing and shipping addresses on the quote.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the address fields in the quote record showing '100 Innovation Way, San Jose, CA 95110' for both billing and shipping addresses.

task_completion.description: Verify the quote includes the correct product line item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the item details section of the quote showing the product 'Cisco Meraki MX68 Router' with a quantity of 2.

task_completion.description: Verify the quote includes the correct service line item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the item details section of the quote showing the service 'Network Installation & Setup' with a quantity of 6.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the CRM GUI to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the CRM web interface being used (e.g., forms being filled out, buttons clicked), not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the CRM application in a web browser, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not manipulate the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of SQL clients or terminal windows executing database insert commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Service Name: 'Network Installation & Setup', Service Price: 125.00. Expected Quote Subject: 'TechNova - Branch Network Setup'. Expected Product Name: 'Cisco Meraki MX68 Router', Product Qty: 2.0. Expected Service Qty: 6.0.
